uk: Свв. мучеників Зиновія й Зиновії, сестри його
saints.en: Sts. Martyrs Zenobius & Zenobia his sister. Blessed Hieromartyr Oleksiy Zarytsky, Presbyter

rubrics:
Вечірня: катизма чергова. На «Господи, взиваю» 6 стихир: 3 Октоїха, 3 мчч., Сл., І нині: хрестобогород. Прокімен дня. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар мчч., Сл., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря мчч. і за днем тижня. Відпуст середній з помин. мчч.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тропар мчч. (2), Сл., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря мчч. Катизми черг., сідальні Октоїха. Пс. 50. Канон Октоїха і мчч. На 9-ій пісні – «Чеснішу від херувимів». По 9-ій – світильний Октоїха, Сл.: світильний мчч., І нині: його богород. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар мчч., Сл., І нині: богород. за гласом тропаря мчч. і за днем тижня. Відпуст середній з помин. мчч.
Часи: на 1-му – дня; на 6-му – храму; на 3-му та 9-му – мчч.
Літургія: вся Служба – дня. Ап. – 1 Сол. 266 зач.; 2, 14-19. Єв. – Лк. 58 зач.; 11, 23-26.

troparion_en.text:
(Podoben: “Be quick to anticipate...”)
O glorious Zenobios and pure Zenobia,  / as siblings united in godliness,  / you contested together, and obtained incorruptible crowns;  / you are also worthy of everlasting glory,  / for together you shine forth upon those in the world with the grace of healing.

kontakion_en.text:
(Podoben: “As to creation's Planter...”)
With God-inspired hymns, let us honor the two Martyrs and preachers of piety,  /  Zenobios and the glorious Zēnobίa,  /  who lived and suffered together  / and through martyrdom,  /  they have obtained incorruptible crowns.

matched_oca_saint: Hieromartyr Zenobios and his sister Zenobia, of Aegæ in Cilicia

oca_saints.name: Hieromartyr Zenobios and his sister Zenobia, of Aegæ in Cilicia

troparion.text:
(Podoben: “Be quick to anticipate...”)
O glorious Zenobios and pure Zenobia,  / as siblings united in godliness,  / you contested together, and obtained incorruptible crowns;  / you are also worthy of everlasting glory,  / for together you shine forth upon those in the world with the grace of healing.

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “As to creation's Planter...”)
With God-inspired hymns, let us honor the two Martyrs and preachers of piety,  /  Zenobios and the glorious Zēnobίa,  /  who lived and suffered together  / and through martyrdom,  /  they have obtained incorruptible crowns.

troparion.text: Holy Apostle Tertius, / entreat the merciful God, / to grant our souls forgiveness of transgressions.
Holy Apostle Mark, / entreat the merciful God, / to grant our souls forgiveness of transgressions.
Holy Apostle Justus, / entreat the merciful God, / to grant our souls forgiveness of transgressions.
Holy Apostle Artemas, / entreat the merciful God, / to grant our souls forgiveness of transgressions.

By sharing in the ways of the Apostles, / you became a successor to their throne. / Through the practice of virtue, you found the way to divine contemplation, O inspired one of God; / by teaching the word of truth without error, you defended the Faith, / even to the shedding of your blood. / Hieromartyr Marcian, entreat Christ God to save our souls.

Your holy martyr Eutropia, O Lord, / through her sufferings has received an incorruptible crown from You, our God. / For having Your strength, she laid low her adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through her intercessions, save our souls!

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You sought the heights...”)
You appeared as a bright star announcing Christ with your radiance,  / which is repulsive to this world, O Martyr Eutropia;  / extinguishing the allure of false gods,  / you enlighten the faithful, /  always interceding for us all.

troparion.text: Your holy martyr Anastasia, O Lord, / through her sufferings has received an incorruptible crown from You, our God. / For having Your strength, she laid low her adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through her intercessions, save our souls!

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You sought the heights...”)
You appeared as a bright star announcing Christ with your radiance,  / which is repulsive to this world, O Martyr Anastasia;  / extinguishing the allure of false gods,  / you enlighten the faithful, /  always interceding for us all.

oca_saints.name: Venerable Dragutin (Theoctistus in Monasticism) of Serbia

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Theoctistus, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy mother Helen, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

oca_saints.name: Ozeryana Icon of the Mother of God

troparion.text: With the certainty of your intercession for us, O Sovereign Lady,  /  and the merciful appearance of your Ozeryanskaya Icon,  /  before which we pour out our souls in prayer, we cry out to you with faith:  /  “O Merciful one, behold your people:  /  we beseech you to assuage all our tribulations and sorrows, /  grant blessed consolation to our hearts and the eternal salvation of our souls, O Most Pure one.”

kontakion.text: O Merciful Mother, do not reject our tears and lamentations,  /  but in your compassion, /   accept the petitions of your people who pray before your Icon, /   strengthen their faith, fill them with humility of heart,  /  and help them to bear the cross of earthly life, /   because whatever you wish, you are able to do.
